gate_description: All required dependencies for the model are installed and recorded.
Model passed sandbox execution on the controlled subset.
All mapped leakage controls verified and none failed.
Tuning mode, max trials, and runtime budget are locked.
Hyperparameter search space is locked and pre-registered.
Random seed or deterministic policy is locked and recorded.
Forecast output schema matches the challenger forecast output contract.
Official backtesting windows are locked for the official run.
No tuning occurs after official evaluation on benchmark windows.
No tuning from tournament rank, champion, significance, MASE, or RMSSE outcomes.
